question: 法国原子能和替代能源委员会在各个技术领域分别有多少专利？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '法国原子能和替代能源委员会' MATCH (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WITH td.name AS domain, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN domain, count ORDER BY count DESC
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '法国原子能和替代能源委员会' RETURN td.name AS tech_domain, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count ORDER BY patent_count DESC

question: 请问海南省在2024年申请了哪些最新的氢能专利？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.province = '海南省' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2024' RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, p.application_date AS date ORDER BY p.application_date DESC LIMIT 20
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.province = '海南省' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) = '2024' RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, p.abstract_cn AS abstract, p.application_date AS date ORDER BY p.application_date DESC

question: 2006年到2022年一共有多少件专利？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2006' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2022' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS total
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2006' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2022' RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS total_patents

question: 物理储氢领域有哪些已经发生转让的专利？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '物理储氢'}) WHERE p.transfer_count > 0 RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year LIMIT 50
pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '物理储氢'}) WHERE p.transfer_count > 0 RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, p.transfer_count AS transfer_count

question: 有诉讼记录的专利总共有多少件？

pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:LITIGATED_WITH]->() RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS litigation_patent_count
